nasb.text: And He was saying to them, “To you has been given the mystery of the kingdom of God, but those who are outside get everything in parables,

esv.text: And he said to them, “To you has been given the secret of the kingdom of God, but for those outside everything is in parables,

cnv.text: 耶穌對他們說：“　神的國的奧祕，只給你們知道，但對於外人，一切都用比喻，

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“上帝国的奥秘只让你们知道，对于外人，我只用比喻，

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“神国的奥秘已经赐给你们了，但是对外人，一切都是用比喻的。
